reasoning: All models skipped PKGBUILD due to misclassification as binary, preventing analysis of build/install logic. PKGBUILD is mandatory for AUR safety assessment.
coverage_issues: Critical failure: PKGBUILD misidentified as binary and skipped. No other files reviewed since audit aborted after PKGBUILD check.
false_negatives: Potential risks in PKGBUILD (network calls, unsafe commands) were completely missed due to skipped analysis
learnings: Fix binary detection: Implement proper text/binary classification using file signatures or heuristics to prevent PKGBUILD misclassification
Fail-safe handling: When PKGBUILD fails initial audit, proceed with caution flags instead of full abort to allow reviewing other files
Tool robustness: Add fallback decoding for misidentified text files before skipping
Priority enforcement: Always force PKGBUILD/.install review even if initial parse fails
